mapper.select: /* TM_SC_NTT_Dao_retrieveNttPopup */ SELECT B.bbs_id, B.ntt_no, B.ntt_tit, B.atchfl_id FROM tm_sc_bbs_mstr A, tm_sc_ntt B WHERE A.bbs_id = B.bbs_id AND A.use_yn = 'Y' AND B.use_yn = 'Y' AND A.bbs_ty_cd = '03' AND A.sys_div_cd = #{sysDivCd} AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN B.ntf_strt_de AND B.ntf_end_de ORDER BY B.frst_regist_dt, B.bbs_id, B.ntt_no
